notes: First v2/stress case. Fits the 'unusual evidence format' criterion of the stress bucket: a Python-faulthandler segfault traceback inside a pytest run, exit code 245. Different shape from any v1.3 test_assertion case (no Expected/Received, no FAIL: marker, just Fatal-Python-error + Python-side stack into a C extension). requires_repo_context = true: the log identifies test_datetime_nat_argsort_stability and the argsort() call but cannot prove the C-level cause without the modified sort source. Runs on the reverse-sorts perf branch where a sort regression is the natural hypothesis.
